pg153-p1-s3: You will learn the full meaning of "Love thy neighbor as thyself."
pg153-p1:
commence shoulder to shoulder your common journey. Then you will know what it means to give of yourself that others may
survive and rediscover life. You will learn the full meaning of "Love thy neighbor as thyself."
pg153-p2-s1: It may seem incredible that these men are to become happy, respected, and useful once more.
pg153-p2-s2:
How can they rise out of
such misery, bad repute and hopelessness?
pg153-p2-s3:
The practical answer is that since these things have happened among us, they
can happen with you.
pg153-p2-s4:
Should you wish them above all else, and be willing to make use of our experience, we are sure they
will come.
pg153-p2-s5: The age of miracles is still with us.
pg153-p2:
It may seem incredible that these men are to become happy, respected, and useful once more. How can they rise out of
such misery, bad repute and hopelessness? The practical answer is that since these things have happened among us, they
can happen with you. Should you wish them above all else, and be willing to make use of our experience, we are sure they
will come. The age of miracles is still with us. Our own recovery proves that!
pg153-p3-s1:
Our hope is that when this chip of a book is launched on the world tide of alcoholism, defeated drinkers will seize upon
it, to follow its suggestions.
pg153-p3-s2: Many, we are sure, will rise to their feet and march on.
pg153-p3-s3:
They will approach still other
sick ones and fellowships of Alcoholics Anonymous may spring up in each city and hamlet, havens for those who must find
a way out.
pg153-p3:
Our hope is that when this chip of a book is launched on the world tide of alcoholism, defeated drinkers will seize upon
it, to follow its suggestions. Many, we are sure, will rise to their feet and march on. They will approach still other
sick ones and fellowships of Alcoholics Anonymous may spring up in each city and hamlet, havens for those who must find
a way out.
pg153-p4-s1: In the chapter "Working With Others" you gathered an idea of how we approach and aid others to health.
pg153-p4-s2:
Suppose now that
through you several families have adopted this way of life.
pg153-p4-s3:
You will want to know more of how to proceed from that
point.
pg153-p4-s4:
Perhaps the best way of treating you to a glimpse of your future will be to describe the growth of the fellowship
among us.
pg153-p4:
In the chapter "Working With Others" you gathered an idea of how we approach and aid others to health. Suppose now that
through you several families have adopted this way of life. You will want to know more of how to proceed from that
point. Perhaps the best way of treating you to a glimpse of your future will be to describe the growth of the fellowship
among us. Here is a brief account:
pg153-p5-s1: Years ago, in 1935, one of our number made a journey to a certain western city.
pg153-p5-s2:
From a business standpoint, his trip
came off badly.
pg153-p5:
